name: Waldorf Astoria Stew- Crock Pot
recipeIngredient: 2 cups potatoes, cut in large pieces
2 cups carrots, cut in large pieces
2 cups celery, cut in large pieces
1 can whole tomatoes (16 oz.), with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a large crock pot.
2. Cover and cook on low setting for 5 hours.
3. Do not stir.
4. Makes 6 to 8 servings. Add additional vegetables as desired for your family's preference.
